title: Commission to construct and operate auditorium
doc_html:
§4673.  Commission to construct and operate auditorium

Municipalities may create a special commission, with such powers and duties as may be delegated to it, to construct, furnish, equip, operate, and manage any auditorium or convention hall erected or acquired under the authority of this Part.
doc_text:
§4673.  Commission to construct and operate auditorium
Municipalities may create a special commission, with such powers and duties as may be delegated to it, to construct, furnish, equip, operate, and manage any auditorium or convention hall erected or acquired under the authority of this Part.
